data.description:
## Why
Overlays must fire only where the plan has surface for them, or the gate over-fires.

## What
- The T1-T12 overlay catalog; deterministic-where-low-FP triggers (T1/T5a/T5d) + an LLM relevance router
  (T8/T6/T9/G6/T10/T11/T12); applies_at level gating.

## Scope
- T10/T11/T12 are LLM-routed for plans (E4-confirmed: deterministic keyword over-fires on rebar's bash->py
  'migration' / ubiquitous 'deploy').

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Overlays fire only on relevant plans; not-applicable returns no finding (near-zero false-fire).
- [ ] Deterministic vs LLM routing per the registry trigger field.
- [ ] Trigger precision measured on the eval corpus.
data.title: Triggered overlays (deterministic + LLM-routed)
